title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Acuite Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Acuite Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!
